**Business Plan for [Nonprofit Name]**  
**Mission: To bridge the digital divide in underserved populations and communities in Seattle and King County by providing free technology training and resources.**

---

## **Executive Summary**

[Nonprofit Name] is a nonprofit organization dedicated to addressing the digital divide in underserved communities within the Seattle and King County area. The organization aims to empower individuals and families by providing access to technology, digital literacy, and support in using digital tools to improve their quality of life. As the digital landscape continues to evolve, many residents in low-income or marginalized communities lack the skills and resources to participate in the modern economy, access essential services, or engage in the digital world.

[Nonprofit Name] will offer free, hands-on technology training programs tailored to the needs of local communities. These programs will be delivered in partnership with local schools, community centers, and non-profits, ensuring that the training is accessible and relevant to the communities it serves. The organization will also provide ongoing support and resources to help participants build long-term digital literacy and confidence.

The mission of [Nonprofit Name] is to create a more equitable digital future by removing barriers to technology access and education. The organization will expand its reach beyond Seattle and King County, eventually becoming a national and international leader in digital inclusion.

---

## **Nonprofit Description**

[Nonprofit Name] is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization founded in [Year] with the mission of eliminating the digital divide in underserved communities. The organization is based in [Location] and operates in partnership with local government, schools, community centers, and technology providers. [Nonprofit Name] is committed to providing free, high-quality technology training and support to individuals and families who lack access to digital tools or digital literacy.

The organization is led by a team of experienced professionals in education, technology, and social justice. Our team includes a Director of Programs, a Curriculum Designer, a Community Engagement Coordinator, and a Financial Director. The organization is supported by a network of volunteers, local businesses, and grantmakers who share our vision of a more digitally inclusive society.

[Nonprofit Name] operates with a mission-driven approach, focusing on equity, accessibility, and long-term impact. Our programs are designed to be inclusive, culturally responsive, and adaptable to the needs of diverse communities. We believe that technology should be a tool for empowerment, not a barrier to opportunity.

---
